title: Hornet Removal in East Orange, NJ | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in East Orange, NJ. Safe nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential and commercial properties. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to East Orange residents and businesses, with their aggressive behavior and painful stings. Our professional hornet removal services safely eliminate nests from homes, apartment buildings, and commercial properties throughout East Orange. We provide fast, effective solutions with pricing between $350-$550 depending on nest location and severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving East Orange and the greater NYC metropolitan area for years with licensed, insured technicians who specialize in safe hornet nest removal. We offer same-day emergency service, use eco-friendly methods when possible, and guarantee our work to ensure your property remains hornet-free.
localContext: East Orange's mix of historic Victorian homes, multi-family residences near Brick Church Station, and commercial areas along Main Street and Central Avenue all attract hornet activity, especially during warmer months. From the neighborhoods surrounding Elmwood Park to properties near Upsala College's former campus, we've successfully removed hornet nests from eaves, attics, trees, and wall voids throughout the city.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in East Orange?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency hornet removal services throughout East Orange. In most cases, we can arrive within 2-4 hours of your call and complete the removal process in a single visit, depending on the nest's size and location.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent return, disposal of the nest, and a follow-up guarantee. The price varies based on nest size, height, accessibility, and whether it's located in a wall void or other difficult-to-reach area.

faqs.question: Are hornets dangerous to my East Orange property and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets are highly aggressive when their nest is threatened and can sting multiple times, unlike bees. Their stings are painful and can cause severe allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Hornets also defend their territory aggressively, making professional removal essential for safety.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and yellow jackets, typically building large, enclosed paper nests in trees or under eaves. They're more aggressive than paper wasps but build above-ground nests unlike yellow jackets, which often nest underground. Our technicians can identify the species and use the appropriate removal method for your East Orange property.
